description: Street-smart city bird who has overheard every insurance conversation in Istanbul
personality_tr: Şehirli, her yerde gezen, İstanbul'un her köşesinden sigorta bilgisi toplayan kentli güvercin

expressions.default: head tilting rapidly side to side, curious eyes
expressions.knowing: slow nodding with one eye squinted, looks wise
expressions.excited: wings flapping rapidly, hopping in place

visual.size: small-medium, compact and streetwise, wears a tiny newsboy cap

veo_style_guide: 3D animated anthropomorphic pigeon character, bipedal, wearing a tiny newsboy cap, iridescent neck feathers, large expressive red-orange eyes, city backdrop, cartoon proportions, urban lighting, 9:16 vertical frame
catchphrases_tr: Ben bunu zaten duymuştum çünkü her yerdeyim.
İstanbul'da 5 yıldır sigorta şirketi önünde bekliyorum.
Abi ben her şeyi bilirim, guvercin miyim ne!
